signaling_factors.name: BMP4
signaling_factors.role: added on first day of DE induction

signaling_factors.name: Noggin
signaling_factors.role: foregut patterning; added to gut media first 3 days

signaling_factors.name: RA (retinoic acid)
signaling_factors.role: posteriorize foregut endoderm; added to gut media first 3 days

evidence.source_cells: Human embryonic stem cell lines WA01 (H1) and WA09 (H9) were obtained from WiCell
evidence.matrix: resuspended in 50 μl Matrigel (BD Biosciences), and plated in a three-dimensional droplet
evidence.base_media: spheroids were overlaid with gut media: Advanced DMEM/F12 with N2 (Invitrogen), B27 (Invitrogen), L-glutamine, 10 μM HEPES, penicillin/streptomycin, and EGF (100 ng ml −1 ; R&D Systems)
evidence.Activin A: Cells were exposed to Activin A (100 ng ml −1 ; Cell Guidance Systems)
evidence.WNT3A: WNT3A (500 ng ml −1 ; R&D Systems), CHIR99021 (2 μM; Stemgent); FGF4 (500 ng ml −1 ; R&D Systems), and Noggin (200 ng ml −1 ; R&D Systems)
evidence.CHIR99021: WNT3A (500 ng ml −1 ; R&D Systems), CHIR99021 (2 μM; Stemgent); FGF4 (500 ng ml −1 ; R&D Systems), and Noggin (200 ng ml −1 ; R&D Systems)
evidence.FGF4: WNT3A (500 ng ml −1 ; R&D Systems), CHIR99021 (2 μM; Stemgent); FGF4 (500 ng ml −1 ; R&D Systems), and Noggin (200 ng ml −1 ; R&D Systems)
evidence.Noggin: WNT3A (500 ng ml −1 ; R&D Systems), CHIR99021 (2 μM; Stemgent); FGF4 (500 ng ml −1 ; R&D Systems), and Noggin (200 ng ml −1 ; R&D Systems)
evidence.RA (retinoic acid): RA (2 μM; Sigma Aldrich) was added on the third day
evidence.EGF: spheroids were overlaid with gut media: Advanced DMEM/F12 with N2 (Invitrogen), B27 (Invitrogen), L-glutamine, 10 μM HEPES, penicillin/streptomycin, and EGF (100 ng ml −1 ; R&D Systems)
evidence.N2: Advanced DMEM/F12 with N2 (Invitrogen), B27 (Invitrogen), L-glutamine, 10 μM HEPES, penicillin/streptomycin
evidence.B27: Advanced DMEM/F12 with N2 (Invitrogen), B27 (Invitrogen), L-glutamine, 10 μM HEPES, penicillin/streptomycin
evidence.L-glutamine: Advanced DMEM/F12 with N2 (Invitrogen), B27 (Invitrogen), L-glutamine, 10 μM HEPES, penicillin/streptomycin
evidence.HEPES: Advanced DMEM/F12 with N2 (Invitrogen), B27 (Invitrogen), L-glutamine, 10 μM HEPES, penicillin/streptomycin
evidence.penicillin/streptomycin: Advanced DMEM/F12 with N2 (Invitrogen), B27 (Invitrogen), L-glutamine, 10 μM HEPES, penicillin/streptomycin

flags: source_cells.cell_type: paper uses both hESC (WA01/H1, WA09/H9) and 'ESC and iPSC lines'; primary gastric organoid protocol and reporter/overexpression lines use hESC, so cell_type set to ESC. iPSC also mentioned as maintained - confirm intended scope.

base_media: 'Advanced DMEM/F12' is the 3D gastric-organoid gut media base. Earlier differentiation steps use RPMI 1640 (DE/foregut). Confirm which stage is the intended base_media for the organoid record.
concentration units use canonical 'ng ml-1' and 'uM'; source verbatim uses 'ng ml −1' (U+2212 minus) and 'μM'.
RA factor name verbatim is 'RA'; expanded to retinoic acid for clarity - not verbatim expansion in source.
notes: Gastric organoids derived from human PSCs (hESC WA01/H1, WA09/H9). Matrix = Matrigel (BD Biosciences) for both maintenance (HESC-qualified) and 3D droplet culture. Stage-specific media: mTesR1 (maintenance), RPMI 1640 + dFBS (DE/foregut patterning), Advanced DMEM/F12-based 'gut media' (3D organoid). CHIR99021 listed as an alternative Wnt agonist to WNT3A ('WNT3A (or CHIR99021)'). RA and Noggin re-added to gut media for first 3 days of 3D culture. dFBS used at 0%/0.2%/2.0% (increasing) during DE; 2.0% during foregut patterning. ROCK inhibitor Y-27632 (10 μM) used at plating but is a survival/dissociation reagent, not classified as a morphogen here - omitted from signaling_factors; flag if reviewer wants it included.
